title: Teleport With Entities
description: Teleport With Entities is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that ensures players teleport with their boats, minecarts, and other ridden entities. Designed for Paper and Spigot servers, seamlessly integrating with EssentialsX.
body:
I got tired of not being able to bring pets, horses, and villagers with me while using the /tpa or /home functions in my server. I developed this plugin since there wasn't anything around that did what I wanted and I thought I'd share.

Teleport With Entities is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that ensures players teleport with their boats, minecarts, and other ridden entities. Designed for Paper and Spigot servers, this plugin seamlessly integrates with EssentialsX, preserving smooth teleportation mechanics. Perfect for survival and economy servers!
